tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Wake Me Up When September Ends

content:
[Intro]
[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] 2x

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
 I walk a lonely road[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]
The only one that I have ever known[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
Don't know where it goes[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
But it's home to me and I walk alone[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
  I walk this empty street[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
On the Boulevard of Broken Dreams[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
Where the city sleeps[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
and I'm the only one and I walk alone[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
  I walk alone, I walk alone[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
  I walk alone, I walk a...[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
  My shadow's the only one that walks beside me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
  My shallow heart's the only thing that's beating[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
  Sometimes I wish someone out there will find me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]B7[/ch]
  Till then I walk alone[/tab]

[Interlude]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
That divides me somewhere in my mind[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
On the border line[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Of the edge and where I walk alone[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
  Read between the lines[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
What's fucked up and everything's alright[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
Check my vital signs[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
To know I'm still alive and I walk alone[/tab]
